form:Form.name: Filtro del Listado de Totales por Conceptos

form:SButton.descrip: Eliminar el elemento de la Lista
form:SButton.name: Delete

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ.oi_liquidacion as id, LIQ.c_liquidacion as COD, LIQ.d_titulo as DES FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as LIQ WHERE LIQ.oi_liquidacion IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
